violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Alfredo in kitchen refrigerator dated late March. -Cooked bacon in kitchen refrigerator door dated for early March. Both are past the 10 day date marking.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -The dry storage area has multiple shelves and 2x4 constructed with bare wood. Advise sealing all bare wood. -Table end in kitchen has particle wood exposed. Advise sealing. -Cardboard being used in walk-in cooler on shelves.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -The 3 sink system was being used "wash, sanitize, rinse". Advised staff on proper steps. "Wash, rinse, Sanitize".

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Single-use items being stored on the floor under pizza ovens.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single-use bowls stored vertical above 3 sink system. Bowls should be stored upside down.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Tiles in kitchen area are in need of repair. -Floor for walk-in cooler is no longer sealed and needs repair.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -A door directly linked to the kitchen was open for air ventilation without the use of a screen door. Advise installing a screen door to keep insects/rodents out.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Dried wiping cloths sitting on counter and no towel pail was present. Maintain a towel pail with proper sanitizer and store wiping cloths in the pail in between uses.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -The table for the pizza ovens is dimensional lumber covered by aluminum foil and the foil is 1/2 missing. The surface must be a smooth nonabsorbent finish.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -They were using the center compartment as a towel pail for the storage of wiping cloths. Maintain a specific towel pail and the 3 compartment sink is to be maintained with a wash, rinse and sanitizing compartment.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. There current practice is to use one of the compartments of their 3 compartment sink as the hand wash sink. A designated hand wash sink is required and cannot be used for any other purpose.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..)* were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -Both handles of the 2 door upright freezer by the Broaster are broken. The latch to the walk in cooler is loose and the bolts are close to falling out.--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Multiple areas of the floor have not been finished yet, Ceiling tiles are missing in areas over the food prep area.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
